titleStmt.title: SII 24.194: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 194. (A.R. No. 45 of 1891.) NORTH WALL OF THE SECOND PRĀKĀRA.

summary.p: Records the victory of Sundara-Pāṇḍya over Hoysaḷa Sōmēśvara and the conquest of Śrīraṅgam and refers to the gifts made to the temple there.
(Published in Ep. Ind., Vol. III, pp. 7 ff.)

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

p.hi: hariḥ

m svasti śrīḥ—yēnāsau karuṇāmanīyata daśām śrīraṅgapatmākaraḥ kṛtvā tam bhuvanāntara praṇayinam karṇṇāṭadōṣākaram . bhūyōpyatra jagattrayībahumatām lakṣmīmavasthāpayandēvassundarapāṇḍyabhānurudayam lēbhē
pratāpōṣmaḷam . 1 dattairnnaikatulādhirōhavidhinā raṅgēśvarasyā layandēva śśrimadhurāmahēndranṛpatirjjāmbūnadairnnirmmamē . Asyō ttuṅgabhujādribhāsurayaśaścandrōdayavya
kā sandhyēvāniśamīkṣyatē navaja pāraktā yadamśu
cchaṭā . 2 kk

cchādya rājatapanaḥ kanakairvvimānam raṅgē harē stadapadā nabhuvā svanāmnā . Asthāpayat parammāpraṇakhāt suvaṇṇa smin pumām sammalē manasīva yōgī . 3 kōśādāttām kṣitipatiraviḥ kāṭhakakṣōṇi bhartturmmālām prādānmaratakamayīm

śārṅgiṇē raṅgadhāmnē . līnā tasyōrasi mahati yā līlayōpētya paścādāliṅgantyāḥ parikalayatē dōrllatāsāmyamurvvyāḥ . 4 dēvāya raṅgapatayē naradēvabhāsvānasparśayanmaṇimayammakuṭa mmahēlṛjāḥ . yasya tviṣā dinamaṇēriva tārakāṇām śāntāruciśśayana
bhōgiphaṇāmaṇīnām . 5 Akṛta kanakavarmmacchāditam
raṅgabharttuśśayanamuraga rājam śārṅgiṇō rājasūryyaḥ . vilasati viharantyā yassamantēna vatyā kavacita Iva lakṣmyāḥ kōṅkumai
raṅgarāgaiḥ . 6 pratyādiṣṭa sumēruśṛṅgavibhavam viśvōttarakṣmāpati
śśrīraṅgē narasiṅhadhāma vidadhē kārttasvaram gōpurama
. yasminnakta mudīrṇṇabhāsuramahastōmē muhūrttam gataḥ paryyaptākṛtirēva bhāskaramiva prāptaśśaśīdṛśyatē . 7 ghōradvairathakhinnakāṭhakapuri sampatsamākarṣiṇā dēvēnēndukulōdvahēna

vidadhē sarvvōttarakṣmābhṛtā . viṣvaksēnavimānamakṣatanabhassañcāravēlō ntiṣadrōcissañcayavañcitadyumaṇinā hēmnātibhūmnā vṛtam . 8 kṛtasya nṛpabhāsvatā ripukirīṭahēmōccayai ranēkamaṇiśōbhinō makara tōraṇasyāntarē .
harirvviracitāsikō jayatiraṅgadhāmāśrayastapātyayapayōdhara ntri daśakārmmukāvēṣṭitam . 9 viṣṇōrutbhuja
sundarasya vidadhē vēśma kṣitindrāryyamā kōśāgāraviluṇṭhitaiḥ kṣitibhujām kōṭīrahē mōccayaiḥ . Adyāpyantikabhūramuṣya bahaḷai
ryyattējasāmutgamai

rutsaṅgasthavidīrṇṇadaityarudhiravyāptēva vidyōtatē [.] 10 raṅgēśvarāya kṣitipālasuryyaḥ prālambamuktāsrajamunnataśrīḥ . bhītēna śakrēṇa kirīṭabhaṅgāt suradrumandattamivōpaninyē . 11 mūrttam yaśassvamiva sundarapāṇḍya
dēvō muktāmayam vyadhita raṅgapatērvvitānam . yasya prabhābhiranuyāti tadīyamaulirbhāgīrathīparigatam makuṭam purārēḥ . 12 kramukapa nasamōcānāndikērāmramukhyaiḥ kanakanicayakaraptai
rnnaikarūpaiḥ phalaughaiḥ . mudamakṛta murārērēkarūpāpiraṅgē
marakatapṛthivībhṛtsambhavā bhaktivallī . 13 nṛpatiravirudārassañcaranmēru tuṅgam vyaracayadadhiraṅgam śātakumbham śatāṅgam . taṭida
bhisaraṇa śrīrvyōmniyasya prabhābhiśśaradavataraṇēpi prāpyatē vārivāhaiḥ . 14 sarvvōttīrṇṇa mahipatirmmadhuripōrddēvasya jētā dviṣām
vistīrṇṇāmataniṣṭa hāṭakamayīm raṅgē prapāñjaṅgamāma
(m) . Aṣṭānām kakubhāmmukhēṣu yugapattatkīrtti candrōdayam viṣvakvi
sphuritairmma yūkhavisaraisandhyēva yā śamsati . 15 raṅgāspadapraṇayinaḥ para masya pumsō haimam suparṇṇamakarōt kṣitipālasūryyaḥ . yasyaā

grajanmana Iva prabhayā sphurantyā sampadyatē jagati śaśvadaharmmukhaśrīḥ . 16 Āsajñayannṛparaviśśayitasya raṅgē kamsadviṣō papuṣi kāñcanamanta rīyam . yasyāmśubhiḥ kavacitēna hiraṇyagarbhē bhūyōniṣaṇṇamiva nābhigatēna dhātrā . 17 Uccaiḥ prabhāvalayam
Ūrjjitakānti haimam prādatta raṅgapatayē narapālasūryyaḥ . Ābhāti yattadupakaṇṭhagatam praphulpti
mantastamālamiva ramyamaśōkaṣaṇḍam . 18 nṛpatapanavitirṇṇāmāsthitō haimapīṭhīm vividhamaṇivicitrām bibhra duccaiḥ prabhāñca . jayatidhṛtamarutvatkārmmukam
raṅganāthaḥ kanakaśikharaśṛṅgasthāyinam kāḷamēgham . 19 caitrē māsi cakāra rājatapanō yātrōtsavam raṅginaśślāghyam kāntimayaistathāt bhuta
mayaissampanmayairvvāsaraiḥ . nandantyēva hi tēna vismayapadam yē bibhratē cētanāmācaitanyabhṛtōpi

yatra dadhatē vṛkṣā vikāsam param . 20 karttum raṅganivāsinaḥ kamalayā sākam vihārōtsavam hēmnā sundarapāṇḍyadēvanṛpati rnnāvannavānnirmmamē . yadrōciḥ khacitaiḥ kavēratanayā rōdhō ruhaiśśāvibhirmmandāradrumaṣaṇḍamaṇḍita taṭāmanvēti mandākinīm . 21 śauryyā
nītairnnarapatiraviśśārṅgiṇō raṅgabharttustastārōccaiḥ kanakanicayai rāntaram satma
sālam . vēlācakram vijayajanuṣā tastarē yassvadhāmnā skandhāvārikṛta
vasumatīsīmasālāyamānam . 22 klaptam sundarapāṇḍya bhūmipatinā yadraṅgabharttuḥ purō dēva

syāhyavahāramaṇḍapamabhū dvistīrṇṇamāyātavat . tēnaiva pratipāditasya haratā pṛūthvīpatīnāndhanam sauvarṇṇasya paricchadasya tadalannāsīdavasthā panē . 23 Āpādacūḍamakarōnnarapāḷa sūryyō raṅgēśiturvva puṣi ratnavibhūṣaṇāni . yairasya vakṣasi
niviṣṭapadāpi patmā
ratnākaram bhavati bhūya Iva praviṣṭā . 24 dharmmadviṣassamiti sundarapāṇḍyadēvē nirmmathya pālayiti
viśvamadhijyacāpē . viṣṇōrvvibhūṣaṇamabhūdamunā vitirṇṇam raṅgālayasyatapanīyamaya ntanutram . 25 Icphām sundarapāṇḍya Unnatimatim bibhratsvayā
samjñayā ni ṣpādyābhyavahāravārayugaḷa nniṣkampasampattikam . sam pūrṇam vidadhē gabhīramudaram raṅgēśituśśārṅgiṇō yasyābhūt bhu
vanaiścaturddaśabhirapyāpūraṇandurllabham . 26 Ātanvatānvahamanēkatulādhirōham raṅgēndradhāmni naradēvadivākarēṇa . hēmnā

masamśayamabhaṅkṣyata mērurartthē tatkētulakṣaṇamadhāsyata cēnna mīnam . 27 mahīpatimahaḥ patiḥ pratinarēndralōkādiva pratāparavimaṇḍalānyapahṛ tāni dōrvvikramaiḥ . suvarṇaparikalpitānyatimahānti pātrāṇya dāt kavēragirikanyakāpuḷinaśāyinē
śārṅgiṇē . 28 sarvvānapraṇatānnipātya nṛpatin siṅhāsanēbhyō haṭharattai
rnnirmmāya samāhṛtairmmana Iva svam prāmśu siṅhā sanam . bhūbhṛtbhā
nuradatta raṅgapatayē yat prāpya lakṣmīsakha ssōyammērutaṭījuṣassataṭitō
mēghasya dhattē śriyam [.29*]
hēmācchādanarāja Ityadhigataprakhyātanāmnō harērhaimasyōragasūda nasya śayanāgārasya cādhiśriyaḥ . triṇi svāmayāni
rājatapana ścakrē vimānāni yaiśśrīraṅgassa Ivābhiṣēkavidhṛtairutbhā
satē maulibhiḥ . 30

div.p: Digital edition of SII 24.194 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
